meta.title: Special Operators versus ALIENS: Max Martini on new movie 'OSIRIS'
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

While a bit unusual for our channel, I’d like to ask you to join me for a conversation with one of my favorite action stars of all time, Max Martini, about his new movie about Special Operators taking on the aliens that abducted them — and how he works hard to add heart to the service members that he plays. 

Osiris opens July 25, 2025 in theaters and on streaming! 
https://www.fandango.com/osiris-2025-241488/movie-overview

Follow Max Martini on Instagram!
https://www.instagram.com/maxmartinila
